Vision Plus Tab 8A
Smart, Sleek and Made for you!

Meet the new Vision Plus Tab 8A, your all-day companion for work , learning , and entertainment. With a stunning 8-inch IPS display, fast Octa-core processor, and 4G LTE connectivity, it delivers smooth performance and beautiful visuals wherever you go.

Power Meets Precision

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]
  • Octa-Core Performance: Powered by the MT8768X
    Octa-Core 2.0 GHz processor, paired with 4 Gigabytes of RAM and 128 Gigabytes of Storage built for smooth multitasking, streaming, and gaming.
  • Android 15: Enjoy a clean, fast, and secure interface with improved app management, smarter battery usage, and enhanced privacy controls.
  • Seamless Experience: Whether you’re browsing, studying, or creating, the Vision Plus Tab 8A delivers speed, stability, and responsiveness.
